items.name_en: 【Top Original Factory】
items.name_cn:
【Top Original Factory】
MCM Ella Visetos🆕New Arrival
Cognac #Small Shopping Bag
Zip-top bag adds a small size❗
·Cp Exclusive®️Cognac Visetos Full Print
This small Toni shopping bag is crafted from the iconic combination of classic Visetos and Nappa leather. It features an MCM logo plate, external back pocket, zip closure, internal pocket, and zip compartment.
Combining exquisite aesthetics with powerful practicality. The soft fabric lining offers ample internal space for storing tablets and accessories, while the top zip closure ensures the safety of your belongings. The external back pocket allows for quick access to your smartphone and other essential items.
Style: G10
Size: 26*11*25cm
Zip: Top zip closure
Handle Drop: 24cm
Color: Cognac
